HTML template for a Flask application with navigation and user authentication links.

# Purpose
The HTML template defines the structure and layout for a web page in a Flask application. It uses Jinja2 templating syntax to dynamically insert content, such as the page title and user-specific navigation options. The template includes a navigation bar with links for user authentication, which change based on whether a user is logged in. It also provides sections for displaying flashed messages and dynamic content blocks, allowing for flexible content rendering. The template links to a CSS stylesheet for styling and ensures that the page layout is consistent across different views in the application.
